appraisal_events.evidence: « Il ne le rencontra pas, parmi ces gens bien élevés. »; Bloch asks to open the windows against Mme de Villeparisis but receives no support and concedes a “défaite.”
appraisal_events.explanation: The well-bred company withholds support for Bloch’s bid to open the windows, leaving him isolated and socially checked.

status_effects.explanation: His attempt to rally the room fails and he is left without allies, indicating local exclusion.
